Meta.title: Citadelle Jiu-Jitsu — Martial arts school in Québec
Meta.description: Brazilian jiu-jitsu school in Québec City. Classes for adults, kids and competitors. First trial class is free.

hero.tagline: The art of combat. The discipline of the warrior.
hero.title: Welcome to the Citadelle
hero.subtitle: Brazilian jiu-jitsu school in Québec City. For adults, kids, and competitors.

coach.title: Trained by the world's best
coach.subtitle: Top 5 in Canada. International competitor. A passion for jiu-jitsu shared with rigor and care — in Québec City, at the heart of the Citadelle.

showcase.title: The Citadelle in action
showcase.subtitle: Training sessions, competitions and highlights — media coming soon.

trialBanner.title: Ready to join the Citadelle?
trialBanner.subtitle: First trial class free for all newcomers. No commitment.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.desc: Every training session forges body, mind, and character.

respect.title: Respect
respect.desc: From the mat to daily life — respect for partners, instructors, and yourself.

progress.title: Progress
progress.desc: Structured curriculum from white belt to black belt.

about.title: Our dojo
about.body: Founded in Québec City, the Citadelle is more than a school: it's a martial arts family. We offer a safe yet demanding environment where every student progresses at their own pace, guided by certified black belt instructors.

Instructors.title: Our instructors
Instructors.subtitle: Certified, passionate black belts — at your service.
Instructors.teamSoon: The team is growing — more instructors will be announced soon.
Instructors.trialCtaSubtitle: First trial class is free — come see for yourself.

Subscriptions.title: Choose your membership
Subscriptions.subtitle: Plans that fit every level and every budget.
Subscriptions.guarantee: No commitment after the first month — cancel anytime.

Shop.title: Citadelle Shop
Shop.subtitle: Official dojo equipment and merchandise.
Shop.noShipping: No automatic shipping — coordinated directly with the owner.

Trial.title: Book your free trial class
Trial.subtitle: An introductory class on the house for newcomers. No commitment.

form.success: Thanks! The owner will contact you within 24 hours to confirm.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or contact us directly.

Contact.subtitle: A question? A group project? Drop us a line.

Gallery.subtitle: Highlights from the dojo and our competitors.
